SUMMARY
Product-minded software engineer who builds reliable workflow automation for recruiting teams and hiring operations.

EXPERIENCE
Senior Product Engineer | Acme Talent | Jan 2021 - Present
- Led migration of resume parsing services to TypeScript and reduced parsing latency by 40%.
- Built React dashboards used by 42 account managers to review candidate pipelines.
- Implemented event-driven integrations with ATS and CRM systems.
- Mentored three engineers and partnered with product on profile completion workflows.

Software Engineer | BrightHire | Jun 2018 - Dec 2020
- Built Node.js APIs for interview scheduling and candidate feedback loops.
- Tuned PostgreSQL queries that reduced recruiter report load time by 35%.
- Added Playwright regression tests for accessibility-critical application flows.
